units.title: Get Started with Apex
units.reason: This unit provides the foundational introduction to Apex, essential for hands-on learning as requested by the intent.

units.title: Use sObjects
units.reason: Understanding sObjects is crucial for hands-on Apex development, as they are the primary way to interact with Salesforce data.

units.title: Manipulate Records with DML
units.reason: This unit focuses on hands-on DML operations, directly addressing the 'hands-on Apex' intent by teaching data manipulation.

units.title: Write SOQL Queries
units.reason: Learning SOQL is a core hands-on Apex skill for retrieving data, directly supporting the 'hands-on Apex' goal.

units.title: Write SOSL Queries
units.reason: This unit covers SOSL, an advanced hands-on Apex querying technique, building upon SOQL for comprehensive data retrieval.
